name: Bottomless Frisk and Chara
description:
After both Frisk’s and Chara’s runs through the underground, the next run has glitched out, allowing the two humans to coexist at the same time. Curious and confused, they start going through the ruins together, before meeting a familiar face…

Full credit to Shimoto Zukafu for their amazing artwork and the Bottomless Frisk and Chara series. Their new animation with Frisk and Chara made me want to try doing a multi bot, so I hoped it turned out well!
creator: TheMightyOlive123
